name: Cole Slaw
recipeIngredient: 5 cups cabbage, finely shredded or using packaged coleslaw mix with precut salad greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Make dressing by mixing the light mayonnaise, nonfat plain yogurt, cider vinegar, sugar, paprika, pepper, and salt.
2. Add to cabbage (finely shredded or from packaged coleslaw mix) and stir until well combined.
